mapper.sql: id, work_order_no, source_type, source_order_no, product_id, product_name, spec, unit_id, batch_no, bom_id, routing_id, customer_id, workshop_id, plan_quantity, dispatched_quantity, input_quantity, finish_quantity, defect_quantity, rework_quantity, over_ratio, priority, plan_start_time, plan_end_time, order_status, kit_status, create_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM prod_work_order WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM prod_work_order WHERE work_order_no = #{workOrderNo} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE prod_work_order
product_id = #{productId}, product_name = #{productName}, spec = #{spec}, unit_id = #{unitId}, batch_no = #{batchNo}, bom_id = #{bomId}, routing_id = #{routingId}, customer_id = #{customerId}, workshop_id = #{workshopId}, plan_quantity = #{planQuantity}, over_ratio = #{overRatio}, priority = #{priority}, plan_start_time = #{planStartTime}, plan_end_time = #{planEndTime}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE prod_work_order SET order_status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 AND bom_id IS NOT NULL AND routing_id IS NOT NULL
UPDATE prod_work_order SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
